---
title: "Data Insights Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

# Public Engagement

## Row {height=35%}

### {quarto-aea}

```{r}
#| title: Total Video Views (Tiktok/Instagram)
#| component: valuebox
#| icon: play-circle
#| color: primary
list(
  value = "124.5K",
  caption = "Total Views This Month"
)
```

### {quarto-aea}

```{r}
#| title: GA4 Engagement Rate
#| component: valuebox
#| icon: graph-up
#| color: success
list(
  value = "68.2%",
  caption = "Target: 60%"
)
```

## Row {height=65%}

### {quarto-aea}

```{r}
#| title: Audience Growth Over Time
library(ggplot2)

# Simple marketing data tracker
months <- factor(c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"),
                 levels = c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"))
followers <- c(1200, 1500, 2100, 3400, 4200, 5600)
data <- data.frame(Month = months, Followers = followers)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Month, y = Followers, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "#6f42c1", linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(color = "#d63384", size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "2026 Timeline", y = "Total Followers")
```
